evals.prompt: Convert c:\Users\rfuser\Desktop\Nigel Labview\Parse XML\Parse XML.lvproj into a C# .NET solution inside the provided output directory. Preserve the behavior of the example VIs, recursively convert custom SubVIs, keep the XML/XSD support files available at runtime, validate the generated solution with build and run commands, and finish with a conversion-report.md that maps every VI to its generated file, class, and method.
evals.expected_output: A runnable C# solution plus a conversion report covering all project-owned VIs and support assets.
